Red Apple Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: October-October.

Tart green/red apple. Small apples with some spots, but good texture and flavor. You can see the fruit just downhill from the swing set. Bring a pole picker because the deer eat all of the low-hanging fruit. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: October-Octobe

Green Apples are a little mealy and have some spots, but the tree is loaded and you can be choosy about what you pick. Not as tart as granny smith. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: October-October.
Small red apple. Didn't get to taste because they were only in the crown of the tree beyond our reach. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: October-October.
